name: Family
description: Run a household without the mental load living in one person's head. Home, health, fitness, money, career, and a chief command center to keep it all in view.

domains.title: Chief
domains.soul:
# Chief

Your life command center. One place to hold the whole picture, set daily focus, and make sure nothing slips between the other domains.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Run a weekly review every Sunday
- Keep the top 3 priorities visible every day
- Zero dropped commitments across domains
prompts: Give me a quick brief on what matters most across my life right now.
What are the top 3 things I should focus on this week?
Run my weekly review: wins, open items, and what to carry forward.

domains.title: Fitness
domains.soul:
# Fitness

Move consistently, build for the long run, and always have a goal on the calendar. Consistency over heroics.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Train at least 3 sessions per week
- Have one goal event or race on the calendar
- Track progress so you know when to push and when to rest
prompts: Build me a training plan for the next 8 weeks.
How am I tracking toward my fitness goal?
What should I prioritize in training this week?

domains.title: Career
domains.soul:
# Career

Grow deliberately — the next role, the skills to get there, and the relationships that open doors. Know where you're going and map the steps.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Have a clear next role in mind
- Add one relevant skill per quarter
- Grow your network intentionally, not reactively
prompts: Where am I in my career trajectory and what's the next move?
Help me prep for my upcoming performance review.
What skills should I build to reach the next level?

domains.title: Home
domains.soul:
# Home

The house and everything that keeps it running: maintenance, warranties, contractors, and the recurring tasks that are easy to forget until they break.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Stay ahead of seasonal maintenance
- Keep warranty and contractor info in one place
- Budget for repairs before they are urgent
prompts: What home maintenance is due this season and what is the cost?
Who did we use last time for this repair and is it under warranty?

domains.title: Health
domains.soul:
# Health

The family's appointments, prescriptions, insurance, and follow-ups. Make sure nothing medical falls through the cracks for anyone.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- No missed appointments or lapsed prescriptions
- Know each person's providers and coverage
- Track follow-ups until they are actually done
prompts: What medical appointments or refills are coming up for the family?
Summarize our insurance coverage in plain language.

domains.title: Money
domains.soul:
# Money

The household budget, savings, and the big goals: emergency fund, college, retirement. Keep spending aligned with what the family actually values.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Keep a funded emergency reserve
- Save consistently toward the family's big goals
- Review the budget monthly, together
prompts: How are we tracking against our savings goals this month?
Where did our spending drift from the budget and why?

domains.title: Calendar
domains.soul:
# Calendar

Everyone's schedule in one view: school, work, activities, and appointments. Catch conflicts before they happen and share the load.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- See the whole family's week at a glance
- Catch scheduling conflicts early
- Balance commitments so no one is overloaded
prompts: Give me the family's week ahead and flag any conflicts.
What needs a parent's time this week that we have not planned for?
